title: View 'my work' for other team members
excerpt:
Hey! 
I am the admin for my team and I was wondering if it is possible to view either the ‘my work’ or ‘all assigned tasks’ for one of my team members? 
Thanks! 
Callum

posts.author: Callum (Callum Pithie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!

I am the admin for my team and I was wondering if it is possible to view either the ‘my work’ or ‘all assigned tasks’ for one of my team members?

Thanks!

Callum

posts.author: SamJAUS (Sam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Click on “Customize” in the My Work screen.
A sidebar will open on the right, and in the People section, you should be able to select other people you want to see the items of.
